title: SAHO Classroom presentation deck
description: Canonical, renderer-agnostic schema for a Classroom 2.0 presentation deck (issue #436). Generation agents (#438-443) emit this JSON; render.php turns it into a single self-contained HTML deck, and a Twig template renders the same structure inside Drupal. Field names align with the saho_classroom content model (field_classroom_grade, field_classroom_subject, field_caps_topic, field_classroom_resource_type) and reconcile the proposal in docs/classroom/20-html-format.md. Where that proposal used flat top-level lesson fields plus `layout`/`title`/`media`, this schema nests lesson metadata under `meta` and prefers `type`/`heading`/`image`; the legacy aliases remain accepted so existing prototype JSON keeps validating.

meta.description: Lesson-level metadata. Drives the title slide, the deck aria-label, the document <title>, and (in Drupal) the entity fields.

id.description: Machine name / URL slug for the lesson.

title.description: Lesson title; used on the title slide and in the document title.

subject.description: CAPS subject; maps to the classroom_subject vocabulary (typically History or Geography).

caps_topic.description: CAPS topic; a term name in the caps_topic vocabulary (field_caps_topic).

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code; enables the #437 multilingual variants.

attribution.description: Rights / credit line shown on the title and closing slides.

sources.description: Sources and references backing the lesson. Rendered as a citations list and available for schema.org markup in Drupal.

url.description: Reference URL. NOTE: shown as citation text only; it is never fetched, so the rendered deck stays free of external requests.

citation.description: Full free-form citation, if preferred over the structured fields.

slide.description: A single slide. `type` selects the layout; `heading` is the slide heading; `image` carries self-contained imagery.

id.description: Stable per-slide id for anchors / deep links. If omitted, render.php assigns slide-N.

type.description: Layout that drives the sub-template. `layout` is accepted as a legacy alias.

heading.description: Slide heading. `title` is accepted as a legacy alias.

lead.description: Optional emphasised intro line (inline Markdown allowed).

body.description: One or more paragraphs of body copy. Blank lines separate paragraphs; inline Markdown (**bold**, *italic*, `code`, [text](url)) is supported.

bullets.description: Convenience unordered list; equivalent to a single `list` block.

columns.description: Two-column layout: each entry is a list of blocks rendered in its own column. Collapses to one column under 720px.

image.description: Self-contained slide imagery. `media` is accepted as a legacy alias.

notes.description: Speaker notes (inline Markdown). Shown in the notes panel and printed as a handout beneath the slide.

block.description: A content block inside a slide or a column.

alt.description: Accessible description of the timeline for the generated SVG.

label.description: Question label, e.g. Q1. Auto-numbered if omitted.

image.description: Self-contained imagery. Either inline SVG markup or a data: URI, so the deck makes zero external requests. External http(s) image URLs are rejected by the renderer.

format.description: `svg` for inline <svg> markup in `data`; `data-uri` for a base64/utf8 data: URI. `type` (svg|image) is accepted as a legacy alias.

type.description: Legacy alias (docs proposal): `svg` inlines markup, `image` expects a data: URI in `data`.

data.description: Inline SVG markup (starts with <svg) or a data: URI (starts with data:). Any other value is treated as unsafe and dropped to preserve self-containment.
